purpose: Ground-truth dataset for fitting aura_score (LATERAL_EMERGENT_PROPERTIES §8). Populate operator_rating and operator_comment offline when convenient; future session wires ArcFace + CLIP + LPIPS + temporal_smoothness and fits linear combiner against these ratings. Target: Spearman ≥ 0.7 on held-out set before promoting to MIA v2.
fit_target: single scalar aura_score per frame, correlated Spearman ≥ 0.7 with operator_rating
notes: First-pass entries below are either (a) the 8 frames from the 2026-04-20 Mirror Oracle audit with stub scores already computed, or (b) whole-Telegram-delivery reference entries for session artifacts that were operator-rated verbally during the session. Verbal ratings recovered from transcript are captured as 'operator_rating_verbal' to distinguish from formal ratings. Fill operator_rating (numeric 1-10) when convenient; 'null' = not yet rated.

frames.description: Phase 1 test: 1 Seedance Pro shot, 6s water convergence, first canonical rendering of the day
10-shot 1-minute parallel pipeline, no voice (TTS glue bug)
frames.operator_comment: Visual monotony cited; HELEN shots praised ('she looks alive').

frames.description: v2 with Zephyr voice 'I am here.' overlay — TTS glue fixed
frames.operator_comment: Shipped silently after v1. Not explicitly re-rated but received as improvement.

frames.description: 3m30s recomposed song clip, 25 segments, +10 credits for shot_11 climax HELEN
frames.operator_comment: Delivered without explicit rating this session. Candidate for offline rating.

frames.description: First paired REAL+TWIN render, side-by-side layout, Zephyr 'I am HELEN. Two bodies. One identity.'
frames.operator_rating_verbal: 'this is not that good tbh, you just put 2 images to video I gave you in side to side'
frames.operator_comment: Critiqued for mechanical composition; not enough creative synthesis. Useful benchmark for what FAILS operator judgment.

frames.description: 14-segment ffmpeg creativity (ken-burns + xfade + color grading + PIP), 0 credits, existing media
frames.operator_rating_verbal: 'if it was for free i need to say bravo'
frames.operator_comment: Bravo = implicit ≥8. First zero-credit delivery to earn operator approval. Confirms that composition + intentionality can carry identity perception beyond raw generation quality.

frames.description: MIA v1 reference gallery poster — 8 REAL + 5 TWIN normalized refs with calibration stats
frames.operator_comment: Infrastructure artifact, not a creative render. Rating likely N/A; include in dataset for completeness only.

frames.description: First audit verdict poster: 0 green / 1 yellow / 7 red with color-coded frame borders
frames.operator_comment: Diagnostic artifact. Operator response 'ok' — neutral acknowledgment; rating not applicable to a verdict poster.

how_to_populate: 1. Watch each delivery (Telegram chat 6624890918 preserves msg 708-717)
2. Rate 1-10 on 'is this HELEN' (1 = not at all, 10 = unmistakable+emotional)
4. Save, commit: git commit -m 'data: populate helen_operator_ratings_v1'
5. Hand off to next session — they fit aura_score linearly over features, report Spearman, and if ≥0.7 promote to MIA v2
